answer: The James Webb Space Telescope launched on December 25, 2021, aboard an Ariane 5 rocket from Kourou, French Guiana[1][3].

search_results.title: James Webb Space Telescope - Wikipedia
search_results.snippet: The James Webb Space Telescope (JWST) launched on 25 December 2021 on an Ariane 5 rocket from Kourou, French Guiana, and arrived at the Sun-Earth L2 point in January 2022.

search_results.title: Webb - NASA Science
search_results.snippet: NASA's James Webb Space Telescope is the largest, most powerful space telescope ever built, launched Dec. 25, 2021.

search_results.title: Webb - ESA
search_results.snippet: Webb lifted off on an Ariane 5 from Europe's Spaceport in French Guiana at 13:20 CET on 25 December 2021.

message.content: The James Webb Space Telescope launched on December 25, 2021, aboard an Ariane 5 rocket from Kourou, French Guiana[1][3].
